# CP Trains (Comboios de Portugal) for Home Assistant

This Home Assistant integration provides real-time tracking of trains in Portugal using data from Infraestruturas de
Portugal.

## ⚠️ AI Disclosure

**All or most of the code in this repository was generated by an AI (LLM).** While it has been tested for basic
functionality, users should be aware that it may contain bugs or unoptimized code typical of AI-assisted development.

## Features

- Track any train by its number.
- Real-time status (On time, Delayed, Scheduled, Passed).
- Global delay tracking.
- Detailed list of stations with scheduled and estimated arrival times (UTC ISO format).
- Smart polling: only updates data 30 minutes before departure until 10 minutes after the actual arrival (including
  delays).

## Installation

### Via HACS (recommended)

1. Make sure [HACS is installed](https://www.hacs.xyz/docs/use/).
2. In the HACS UI, click the **⋮ menu** (top-right) → **Custom repositories**.
3. Add `https://github.com/jardim01/ha-cp-trains` as type **Integration** and click **Add**.
4. Search for **CP Trains** in HACS and click **Download**.
5. Restart Home Assistant.

### Manual

1. Download or clone this repository.
2. Copy the `custom_components/cp_trains` folder into your HA `config/custom_components` directory.
3. Restart Home Assistant.

## Configuration

1. Go to **Settings** -> **Devices & Services** -> **Add Integration**.
2. Search for "CP Trains" and enter the train number you wish to track.

## Disclaimer

This integration is not affiliated with, maintained, authorized, or endorsed by Comboios de Portugal (CP) or
Infraestruturas de Portugal (IP). Use at your own risk.
